freezetime.desc: Buy-time freeze period at round start, in seconds (mp_freezetime).

map.desc: Map to load on server start.

port.desc: UDP port the server will bind to.

rcon_password.desc: Password required for remote console (RCON) access.

startmoney.desc: Money players start each round with (mp_startmoney).

sv_lan.desc: Restrict the server to LAN clients only (sv_lan).

timelimit.desc: Map time limit in minutes, 0 for no limit (mp_timelimit).

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/cs16 && until [ -f /tmp/cs16/hlds_run ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +login anonymous +app_info_print 90 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +login anonymous +app_info_print 90 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +force_install_dir /tmp/cs16 +login anonymous +app_set_config 90 mod cstrike +app_update 90 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/cs16/hlds_run ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/cs16/. . && rm -rf /tmp/cs16'
